problem.title: Number of Substrings Containing All Three Characters

approaches.title: Track character positions with per-character queues
approaches.summary: Stores every index for each character in linked lists, then advances the queue for the character at each position to determine how many valid substrings begin.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial queue-based solution using three LinkedLists of character positions.

approaches.title: Track latest occurrence of each character
approaches.summary: Maintains the most recent index of each character and adds one plus the smallest latest index to count valid substrings ending at each position.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces position queues with a constant-space last-seen index array and direct counting.
